name: Fruity Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in 1 cup fruit juice in a medium mixing bowl.
2. Bring another cup of juice to a boil and stir in the gelatin/juice mixture.
3. Continue stirring until the gelatin is dissolved.
4. Add the remaining cup of juice.
5. Pour into an 8-inch square pan and refrigerate until firm.
Kids love these cut with cookie cutters into their favorite shapes.
Holiday treats are always welcome - orange-pineapple pumpkins at Halloween, red fruit-berry bells at Christmas, use your imagination and enjoy!
A drop of food coloring in white grape juice will transform it to any "season".
Great in a candy dish for nibblers. Servings: 30 calories, 7.5 grams carbs, no protein or fat.
